name: dgbowl-schemas

metadata.name: dgbowl-schemas
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)
metadata.summary: schemas for the dgbowl suite of tools

documentation:
# dgbowl-schemas
## Schemas and validators for the `dgbowl` suite of tools.

Currently implemented schemas are:
- `Recipe` validator for **dgpost**, versions `{2.1, 1.0}`
- `DataSchema` validator for **yadg**, versions `{6.0, 5.1, 5.0, 4.2, 4.1, 4.0}`
- `Payload` validator for **tomato**,  at version `{1.0, 0.2, 0.1}`

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_6_0.parameters.Parameters
documentation: Empty parameters specification with no extras allowed.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_6_0.stepdefaults.StepDefaults

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_6_0.stepdefaults.StepDefaults.timezone
documentation:
Global timezone specification.

:::{note}
This should be set to the timezone where the measurements have been
performed, as opposed to the timezone where {mod}`yadg` is being executed.
Otherwise timezone offsets may not be accounted for correctly.
:::

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_6_0.stepdefaults.StepDefaults.locale
documentation: Global locale specification. Will default to current locale.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_6_0.stepdefaults.StepDefaults.encoding
documentation: Global filetype encoding. Will default to `utf-8`.
Configuration of defaults applicable for all steps.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_6_0.filetype.ExtractorFactory
documentation:
Extractor factory class.

Given an `extractor=dict(filetype=k, ...)` argument, attempts to determine the
correct {class}`FileType`, parses any additionally supplied parameters for that
{class}`FileType`, and back-fills defaults such as `timezone`, `locale`, and
`encoding`.

The following is the current usage pattern in {mod}`yadg`:

```
ftype = ExtractorFactory(extractor={"filetype": k}).extractor
```

:::{admonition} DEPRECATED in `DataSchema-4.2`
This feature is deprecated as of `yadg-4.2` and will
stop working in `yadg-5.0`.
:::

Parser for raw chromatography traces.

:::{note}
For parsing processed (integrated) chromatographic data, use the
{class}`ChromData` parser.
:::

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_4_2.step.ChromData
documentation: Parser for processed chromatography data.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_4_2.step.MassTrace
documentation: Parser for mass spectroscopy traces.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_4_2.step.QFTrace

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_4_2.step.XPSTrace

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_4_2.step.XRDTrace
documentation: Parser for XRD traces.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.stepdefaults.StepDefaults

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.stepdefaults.StepDefaults.timezone
documentation:
Global timezone specification.

:::{note}
This should be set to the timezone where the measurements have been
performed, as opposed to the timezone where {mod}`yadg` is being executed.
Otherwise timezone offsets may not be accounted for correctly.
:::

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.stepdefaults.StepDefaults.locale
documentation: Global locale specification. Will default to current locale.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.stepdefaults.StepDefaults.encoding
documentation: Global filetype encoding. Will default to `utf-8`.
Configuration of defaults applicable for all steps.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.DataSchema

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.DataSchema.metadata
documentation: Input metadata for {mod}`yadg`.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.DataSchema.step_defaults
documentation: Default values for configuration of each {class}`Step`.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.DataSchema.steps
documentation:
Input commands for {mod}`yadg`'s extractors, organised as a {class}`Sequence`
of {class}`Steps`.

A {class}`pydantic.BaseModel` implementing `DataSchema-5.1` model
introduced in `yadg-5.1`.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDateFile

documentation: Path to the external date information file.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDateFile.Content.type
documentation: Type of the external date information file.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDateFile.Content.match
documentation: String to be matched within the file.
Read external date information from file.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDateFilename

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDateFilename.Content.format
documentation: ``strptime``-like format string for processing the date.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDateFilename.Content.len
documentation: Number of characters from the start of the filename to parse.
Read external date information from the file name.

documentation: Read a constant external date using an ISO-formatted string.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDateUTSOffset
documentation: Read a constant external date using a Unix timestamp offset.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDate

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDate.using
documentation: Specification of the external date format.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.externaldate.ExternalDate.mode
documentation:
Whether the external timestamps should be added to or should replace the
parsed data.
Supply timestamping information that are external to the processed file.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.timestamp.TimestampSpec
documentation: Specification of the column index and string format of the timestamp.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.timestamp.Timestamp
documentation: Timestamp from a column containing a single timestamp string.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.timestamp.UTS
documentation: Timestamp from a column containing a Unix timestamp.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.timestamp.TimeDate
documentation: Timestamp from a separate date and/or time column.

documentation: Returns a list of files to be processed by the {class}`Step`.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.input.Input.files
documentation: Files, or folders to be searched for matching files.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.input.Input.prefix
documentation: Prefix of the filenames to be matched.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.input.Input.suffix
documentation: Suffix of the filenames to be matched.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.input.Input.contains
documentation: A string the matched filenames must contain.

Specification of input files/folders to be processed by the {class}`Step`.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.filetype.FileType
documentation: Template abstract base class for parser classes.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.filetype.Basic_csv.Parameters.sep
documentation: Separator of table columns.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.filetype.Basic_csv.Parameters.strip
documentation: A {class}`str` of characters to strip from headers & data.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.filetype.Basic_csv.Parameters.units
documentation: A {class}`dict` containing `column: unit` keypairs.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.filetype.Basic_csv.Parameters.timestamp
documentation:
Timestamp specification allowing calculation of Unix timestamp for
each table row.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.yadg.dataschema_5_1.filetype.ExtractorFactory
documentation:
Extractor factory class.

Given an `extractor=dict(filetype=k, ...)` argument, attempts to determine the
correct {class}`FileType`, parses any additionally supplied parameters for that
{class}`FileType`, and back-fills defaults such as `timezone`, `locale`, and
`encoding`.

The following is the current usage pattern in {mod}`yadg`:

```
ftype = ExtractorFactory(extractor={"filetype": k}).extractor
```

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.extract.Extract

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.extract.Extract.into
documentation: Name of a new, or existing / loaded table into which the extraction happens.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.extract.Extract.from_
documentation: Name of the source object for the extracted data.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.extract.Extract.at
documentation: Specification of the steps (or data indices) from which data is to be extracted.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.extract.Extract.columns
documentation: Specifications for the columns to be extracted, including new headers.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.extract.Extract.constants
documentation: Specifications for additional columns containing data constants, including units.
Extract columns from loaded files into tables, interpolate as necessary.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.transform.Transform

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.transform.Transform.table
documentation: The name of the table loaded in memory to be transformed.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.transform.Transform.with_
documentation: The name of the transform function from **dgpost's** transform library.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.transform.Transform.using
documentation: Specification of any parameters required by the transform function.
Calculate and otherwise transform the data in the tables.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.Recipe

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.Recipe.load
documentation: Select external files (`NetCDF` or `json` datagrams, `pkl` tables) to load.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.Recipe.extract
documentation: Extract columns from loaded files into tables, interpolate as necessary.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.Recipe.pivot
documentation: Reorder tables by grouping rows into arrays using columns as indices.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.Recipe.transform
documentation: Calculate and otherwise transform the data in the tables.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.Recipe.plot
documentation: Plot data from a single table.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.Recipe.save
documentation: Save a table into an external (`pkl`, `xlsx`) file.
A {class}`pydantic.BaseModel` implementing `Recipe-2.1` model for {mod}`dgpost`.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.save.Save

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.save.Save.table
documentation: The name of the table loaded in memory to be stored.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.save.Save.as_
documentation: Path to which the table is stored.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.save.Save.type
documentation:
Type of the output file.

:::{note}
Round-tripping of {mod}`dgpost` data is only possible using the `pkl` and `nc`
formats. For long-term storage, the `json` and `nc` formats may be better suited.
The other formats (`xlsx` and `csv`) are provided for convenience only and should
not be used for chaining of {mod}`dgpost` runs.
:::

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.save.Save.columns
documentation:
Columns to be exported. By default (`None`), all columns from the specified `table`
will be exported.

:::{note}
If any of the columns supplied is not present in the table, a warning will be
printed by {mod}`dgpost`.
:::

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.save.Save.sigma
documentation:
Whether uncertainties/error estimates in the data should be stripped. Particularly
useful when exporting into `xlsx` or `csv`.
Save a table into an external (`pkl`, `xlsx`) file.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.pivot.Pivot

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.pivot.Pivot.table
documentation: The name of the table loaded in memory to be pivoted.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.pivot.Pivot.as_
documentation: The name for the resulting table for in memory storage.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.pivot.Pivot.using
documentation: A column name (or their sequence) by which the pivoting is performed.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.pivot.Pivot.columns
documentation: A sequence of column names which are to be pivoted.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.pivot.Pivot.timestamp
documentation:
Specification of the resulting timestamp for the pivoted data. For each pivoted
row, the `first` or `last` timestamp can be used as index. Alternatively, the
`mean` can be calculated and used as index.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.pivot.Pivot.timedelta
documentation:
If provided, the corresponding time deltas for the pivoted data is computed and
stored under the provided column name. By default, this data is not computed.
Reorder tables by grouping rows into arrays using columns as indices.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.plot.Plot

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.plot.Plot.table
documentation: The name of the table loaded in memory to be plotted.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.plot.Plot.nrows
documentation: Number of rows in the figure grid.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.plot.Plot.ncols
documentation: Number of columns in the figure grid.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.plot.Plot.fig_args
documentation: Any optional method calls for the figure; passed to `matplotlib`.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.plot.Plot.ax_args
documentation: Specifications of the figure axes, including selection of data for the plots.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.plot.Plot.style
documentation: Specification of overall `matplotlib` style.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.plot.Plot.save
documentation: Arguments for saving the plotted figure into files.
Plot data from a single table.

classes.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.load.Load

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.load.Load.as_
documentation: Name under which the loaded object will be stored in memory.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.load.Load.path
documentation: Path to the file containing the object to be loaded.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.load.Load.type
documentation:
Type of the loaded object. Can be either a `NetCDF` file created e.g. using
`yadg~5.0`, a `datagram` file in JSON format created using `yadg~4.0`, or a
`table` stored in a `pkl` file as created by Pandas.

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.dgpost.recipe_2_1.load.Load.check
documentation:
:::{deprecated} 2.1
The `check` attribute of {class}`Load` has been deprecated. The passed value
is currently ignored, however it **will cause an error** in future versions of
{class}`~dgbowl_schemas.Recipe`.
:::
Select external files (`NetCDF` or `json` datagrams, `pkl` tables) to load.

Additional attributes for each {class}`Sample` may be required, depending on the
{class}`Method` type.

documentation: tag of the *device* within a tomato *pipeline*

The {class}`Method` schema is completely *device*- and `technique`- dependent,
with extra arguments required by each `technique` defined by each device driver.

documentation: sample name for matching with tomato *pipelines*

Additional attributes for each {class}`Sample` may be required, depending on the
method within the payload.

documentation: tag of the pipeline component on which this {class}`Method` should run

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.tomato.payload_1_0.task.Task.max_duration

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.tomato.payload_1_0.task.Task.sampling_interval

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.tomato.payload_1_0.task.Task.polling_interval

class_variables.name: dgbowl_schemas.tomato.payload_1_0.task.Task.technique_params
documentation: a {class}`dict` of additional parameters required to specify the experimental technique

The {class}`Task` is a driver/device-independent abstraction describing the
measurement steps. The driver-specific information for the {class}`Task` can be
provided via the `technique` parameter.
